title: search_fragments data payload
description: Structured payload for the `search_fragments` tool. eBL /api/fragments/query results. `resolved_mode` reports which parameter eBL was queried under (auto-detection collapses to `number` for museum-number-shaped queries, else `transliteration`).

resolved_mode.description: Which eBL query parameter the search used. `auto` is resolved client-side based on whether the query looks like a museum number.

match_count_total.description: Sum of `matchCount` across all returned fragments — eBL's count of line-level matches on this page (not the total catalog match count).

museum_number_obj.description: eBL's three-component form. Use this when walking joins[] or matching against other typed payloads to avoid string-parse landmines.

matching_lines.description: Line numbers within the fragment that matched the query.
